title: Smoky Irish Stew
description: A hearty, comforting stew made with tender chunks of meat and flavorful vegetables.

ingredients.name: Smoky Smoked Paprika
ingredients.notes: Smoked paprika adds a smoky flavor

ingredients.name: Mustardy Mustard
ingredients.notes: Whole-grain mustard adds a tangy flavor

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced aubergine and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced carrots and diced potatoes and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the Irish stew meat and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the smoked paprika and mustard, and stir to combine.
Add 4 cups of beef broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
